# Step x: Understanding the relationship of `oscal-content` to `complyscribe`

## Read about `ComplianceAsCode/oscal-content`

### Behind the scenes

The `ComplianceAsCode/oscal-content` repository automates transformation from  `ComplianceAsCode/content` to the OSCAL format. 

> The transformations are done manually using `complyscribe`
